sudo -u ec2-user bash -c 'cat > /tmp/rundirs.py <<PYEOF
import os, json, glob, sys
root = sys.argv[1]
print("root:", root)
for d in sorted(glob.glob(root + "/*/")):
    rs = d + "run-state.json"
    cases = glob.glob(d + "cases/*.json")
    status = "?"
    completed = "?"
    runId = os.path.basename(d.rstrip("/"))
    if os.path.exists(rs):
        try:
            state = json.load(open(rs))
            status = state["status"]
            completed = len(state["completedCases"])
        except Exception as e:
            status = f"err:{e}"
    print(f"  {runId}: {len(cases)} cases, status={status}, completed={completed}")
PYEOF
python3.11 /tmp/rundirs.py /home/ec2-user/platform/data/smoker-shard-a'
